review: The Matcha Gimbap was incredible. The crunch and the quality of seaweed is top notch.
draft: Arjun, thanks for noticing the effort we put into sourcing the best seaweed for our Matcha Gimbap - it's a game changer, isn't it? We're really happy you enjoyed it.

review: The Matcha was very authentic. I just wish the seating was a bit more cozy, but the food is great.
draft: Thanks for noticing the authenticity of our Matcha, Priya - that means a lot to us. Sorry the seating didn't quite feel cozy enough for you, we're actually working on making some changes to make it feel more welcoming. Glad you enjoyed the food, though - hope you come back and see how we've improved.

review: Bhai, gimbap ka taste thoda off tha aaj. Seaweed was very soggy. Expected better from Koicha.
draft: Vikram, sorry to hear the gimbap didn't turn out right this time, I'll check with our team about the seaweed, it's usually crispy and fresh. Would love to have you back and try it again on us.
